description: Major water pipe burst on main street, flooding the area.
Exposed electrical wires sparking from the pole near Connaught Place.
A large tree has fallen and is completely blocking the road on MG Road.

Building on fire, emergency services needed now.

Traffic congestion due to a badly managed event.

Flickering streetlight, not completely out but annoying.
